scripts.docker:prune: docker compose down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans && docker volume prune -f
scripts.test: bun test packages/messaging/tests/unit packages/provably-fair/tests/unit packages/round-engine/tests/unit services/games/tests/unit services/wallets/tests/unit
scripts.test:e2e: bun test services/wallets/tests/e2e/wallets.spec.ts && bun test services/games/tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts services/games/tests/e2e/messaging.spec.ts services/games/tests/e2e/gameplay.spec.ts
